ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code of the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the district */,
  "district_manager" TEXT /* Name of the district manager */,
  "district_office_address" TEXT /* Address of the district office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Code of the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the county */,
  "county_manager" TEXT /* Name of the county manager */,
  "county_office_address" TEXT /* Address of the county office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well type */,
  "type_code" TEXT /* Code of the well type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the well type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well type */,
  "well_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the well type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code of the well status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the well status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well status */,
  "well_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the well status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "ogrid" INTEGER /* OGRID number of the operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the operator */,
  "operator_address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  "operator_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pool */,
  "pool_name" TEXT /* Name of the pool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pool */,
  "pool_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_pools" (
  "well_pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well-pool association */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pool */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was associated with the pool */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_pools_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, operator, auditor) */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the well */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_operation_types" (
  "operation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "operation_type_code" TEXT /* Code of the operation type */,
  "operation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., processing plant, storage facility) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_depletion_types" (
  "pool_depletion_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pool depletion type */,
  "pool_depletion_type_code" TEXT /* Code of the pool depletion type */,
  "pool_depletion_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pool depletion type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pool depletion type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_depletion_type_id")
)
